reason: Verified that agent "QA-20260505-191201-9ahq" is accessible, has status "idle", accepts messages, and responds with correct answer "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Step 2: Found "QA-20260505-191201-9ahq" agent in sidebar and clicked it — Agent page loaded successfully, displaying agent home with message input
Step 3: Verified agent status — Agent status shows "idle" in the top right corner of the page, meeting the requirement (running or idle)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed into the input field and sent via the send button
Step 5: Waited for response — Response received immediately (no delay), well within the 3-minute timeout

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" — Agent responded with exactly "4", which correctly answers the math question. A new session titled "Math Question Session" was created and is visible in the sidebar. Screenshot captured showing the conversation with the correct answer displayed.
